reasoning: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.

concerns.analysis: Several complete pages and distinct topics from the 'Saving Lives Together' brochure are missing from the output. Specifically, Page 29 and 30 ('Cardiac Arrest Case Review') and Page 31 ('BLS and Responder Education') contain significant unique information that is entirely absent in the JSON. Additionally, pages 22-27 of the brochure are missing, although some redundant information regarding program descriptions is found in the earlier 'Instructional Overview' section.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Pages 29-30 'Cardiac Arrest Case Review' and Page 31 'BLS and Responder Education' of the source PDF.
concerns.output_quote: The text from these pages is completely absent from the JSON output.
concerns.location: Missing between JSON Section 6 and Section 7.

concerns.analysis: The table 'Curriculum Overview Comparison' on Page 28 of the source PDF contains 13 data rows comparing different program features. The corresponding table in JSON Section 6 contains only 3 data rows, missing approximately 77% of the required information.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Table 'Curriculum Overview Comparison' on Page 28 of the source PDF contains 13 rows (RQI T-CPR Course, Quarterly Continuing Education, Quarterly Simulation Skills Assessment & Practice, Quarterly Individual Simulation Skills Performance Summary Report, T-CPR Training Hours, Certificate of Completion or AHA T-CPR Credential, T-CPR Performance Baseline Assessment, Resuscitation Quality Improvement Planning, Designated RQI Quality Manager, RQI Learning Management System (LMS), FirstWatch T-CPR Ana
concerns.output_quote: The table in Section 6 contains only 3 rows: 'RQI T-CPR Course', 'T-CPR Training Hours', and 'Cost per Learner'.

concerns.description: Significant text omission within a section
concerns.analysis: The brochure section (Pages 18-33) is heavily truncated. While the introductory pages are captured in Section 5, significant portions of the subsequent text, including curriculum overviews and quotes found on pages 22-27 and 29-32, are omitted. This constitutes a loss of well over 25% of the intended content for this part of the document.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Content from the 'Saving Lives Together' brochure spanning Pages 18-33.
concerns.output_quote: Section 5 ('Telecommunicator CPR Program') includes content only from Pages 18, 20, and 21, omitting the vast majority of the subsequent brochure text.

concerns.analysis: Several lists within the document were incorrectly converted into flat text paragraphs rather than semantic list structures. On Page 1, the agenda topics (numbered 1-13) are rendered as a single paragraph in the JSON. Similarly, on Pages 11-14, the 'Enabling Learning Objectives' and 'Topics Covered' for the T-CPR course, which are clearly bulleted in the source, are concatenated into single paragraph elements in Section 4. The Table of Contents on Page 8 is also converted into a single paragraph
concerns.source_pdf_quote: 1. Chair Opening Remarks Chuck Greene\n2. Welcome Pokey Harris... (Page 1); Enabling Learning Objectives: • Describe the importance of Telecommunicators... (Page 11)
concerns.output_quote:
{"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "Tab Topic Presenter
1. Chair Opening Remarks Chuck Greene
2. Welcome Pokey Harris..."}]} (Section 1, Element 3); {"type": "paragraph", "content": [{"text": "Enabling Learning Objectives:
• Describe the importance of Telecommunicators..."}]} (Section 4, Element 11)

concerns.analysis: The pipeline successfully identified and injected some hyperlinks (e.g., the AHA guidelines URL on Page 9). However, it failed to make other clear URLs clickable. Specifically, the URL 'RQIPartners.com/TCPR' which appears on Pages 17 and 33 is present only as static text in the JSON and lacks an 'href' attribute. While most contact emails were correctly hyperlinked, this missing URL is a minor structural inconsistency.
concerns.output_quote: "To access RQI T-CPR program resources and case studies, visit:\nRQIPartners.com/TCPR" (no href)

action_items: Fidelity composite critically low: 0.40 (3/3 dimensions evaluated). Document quality below minimum threshold for publication.
